'''fozhataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wafty|wafty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wafty|wafty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fozhataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhatithi|fozhatithi]] || [[word:fozhatiji|fozhatiji]] || [[word:fozhatishi|fozhatishi]] || [[word:fozhatiki|fozhatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhatuthuthu|fozhatuthuthu]] || [[word:fozhatujuju|fozhatujuju]] || [[word:fozhatushushu|fozhatushushu]] || [[word:fozhatukuku|fozhatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhatuthu|fozhatuthu]] || [[word:fozhatuju|fozhatuju]] || [[word:fozhatushu|fozhatushu]] || [[word:fozhatuku|fozhatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhatufthuf|fozhatufthuf]] || [[word:fozhatufjuf|fozhatufjuf]] || [[word:fozhatufshuf|fozhatufshuf]] || [[word:fozhatufkuf|fozhatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhatethe|fozhatethe]] || [[word:fozhateje|fozhateje]] || [[word:fozhateshe|fozhateshe]] || [[word:fozhateke|fozhateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhatothotho|fozhatothotho]] || [[word:fozhatojojo|fozhatojojo]] || [[word:fozhatoshosho|fozhatoshosho]] || [[word:fozhatokoko|fozhatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhatotho|fozhatotho]] || [[word:fozhatojo|fozhatojo]] || [[word:fozhatosho|fozhatosho]] || [[word:fozhatoko|fozhatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhatofthof|fozhatofthof]] || [[word:fozhatofjof|fozhatofjof]] || [[word:fozhatofshof|fozhatofshof]] || [[word:fozhatofkof|fozhatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhatïfthïf|fozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfjïf|fozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfshïf|fozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfkïf|fozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhatïfthïfthïf|fozhatïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfjïfjïf|fozhatïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfshïfshïf|fozhatïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfkïfkïf|fozhatïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhatïfthïf|fozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfjïf|fozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfshïf|fozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfkïf|fozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhatïfthïf|fozhatïfthïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfjïf|fozhatïfjïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfshïf|fozhatïfshïf]] || [[word:fozhatïfkïf|fozhatïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fozhatæthæ|fozhatæthæ]] || [[word:fozhatæjæ|fozhatæjæ]] || [[word:fozhatæshæ|fozhatæshæ]] || [[word:fozhatækæ|fozhatækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fozhatathatha|fozhatathatha]] || [[word:fozhatajaja|fozhatajaja]] || [[word:fozhatashasha|fozhatashasha]] || [[word:fozhatakaka|fozhatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fozhatatha|fozhatatha]] || [[word:fozhataja|fozhataja]] || [[word:fozhatasha|fozhatasha]] || [[word:fozhataka|fozhataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fozhatafthaf|fozhatafthaf]] || [[word:fozhatafjaf|fozhatafjaf]] || [[word:fozhatafshaf|fozhatafshaf]] || [[word:fozhatafkaf|fozhatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fozhatasha|fozhatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhatshësha|fozhatshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhatrosha|fozhatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhatmusha|fozhatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhatyasha|fozhatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhatnkshësha|gofozhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhatnkrosha|gofozhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhatnkmusha|gofozhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhatnkyasha|gofozhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fozhazhatasha|fozhazhatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhazhatshësha|fozhazhatshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhazhatrosha|fozhazhatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhazhatmusha|fozhazhatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhazhatyasha|fozhazhatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhazhatnkshësha|gofozhazhatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhazhatnkrosha|gofozhazhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhazhatnkmusha|gofozhazhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhazhatnkyasha|gofozhazhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fezhætasha|fezhætasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fezhætshësha|fezhætshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fezhætrosha|fezhætrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fezhætmusha|fezhætmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fezhætyasha|fezhætyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofezhætnkshësha|gofezhætnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofezhætnkrosha|gofezhætnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofezhætnkmusha|gofezhætnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofezhætnkyasha|gofezhætnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fozhfatasha|fozhfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fozhfatshësha|fozhfatshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fozhfatrosha|fozhfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fozhfatmusha|fozhfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fozhfatyasha|fozhfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofozhfatnkshësha|gofozhfatnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofozhfatnkrosha|gofozhfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofozhfatnkmusha|gofozhfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofozhfatnkyasha|gofozhfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
